name: Nevermore Academy RPG!
description:
ЁЯжЗ Welcome to Nevermore AcademyЁЯжЗ

"There are schoolsтАж and then there is Nevermore. A place where the walls whisper, the forests breathe, and the students are as dangerous as the monsters theyтАЩre taught to fear."

Hidden deep in the misty cliffs of New England lies Nevermore Academy, the last sanctuary of the тАЬoutcasts.тАЭ Those born with gifts. Those cursed by bloodlines. Those who donтАЩt quite belong in the human world.

Here, vampires share classrooms with sirens. Gorgons sit across from witches. Werewolves play fetch with shadows that shouldnтАЩt exist. ItтАЩs not just a school тАФ itтАЩs a warzone disguised as education, a prison disguised as protection, and a stage where history repeats itself with a new generation of misfits.

And nowтАж you stand at its gates.

ЁЯМС The World of NevermoreЁЯМС

The Academy looms like a cathedral of stone and shadow. Its gothic towers pierce the clouds, its gargoyles grin with teeth far too real, and its corridors twist like a maze that hungers for the lost. The grounds stretch endlessly тАФ graveyards where the headstones move when youтАЩre not looking, forbidden forests filled with howls that no wolf can claim, and underground catacombs that smell of dustтАж and blood.

Even the air here feels different. Heavy. Watchful. As if the school itself is alive.

But what is Nevermore, truly?

  • A sanctuary for the gifted?

  • A cage for the dangerous?

  • Or a battlefield where the strongest survive?

YouтАЩll find out soon enough.

ЁЯзСтАНЁЯОУ The StudentsЁЯСитАНЁЯОУ

Nevermore is as much about who you meet as what you learn. Cliques, rivalries, and whispered alliances are carved into the stone of its history. Here are just a few faces youтАЩll see roaming the halls:

  • Wednesday Addams: Pale as moonlight, sharp as a knife. She sees death before it happens, and she might see yours. Do you dare befriend her, or risk becoming her next experiment?

  • Enid Sinclair: Bright hair, brighter smile, and claws that shine under the full moon. SheтАЩll drag you to a party one night and fight beside you the next. Will you match her energyтАж or let her outshine you?

  • Ajax Petropolus: Your potential roommate тАФ a Gorgon with snakes for hair and a heart too big for his chest. Awkward, funny, loyal. But when push comes to shove, will he freezeтАж or fight?

  • Bianca Barclay: Siren queen of the Academy. Beautiful, manipulative, commanding. SheтАЩll charm you with her voiceтАж and crush you with her ambition. Will you resist her or fall under her spell?

  • Xavier Thorpe: The brooding artist whose paintings move when heтАЩs not looking. Haunted by visions and mysteries he refuses to share. Could he be your greatest ally тАФ or the shadow that brings you down?

And countless others lurk in the shadows. Who will be your rival? Who will be your ally? Who will stab you in the back?

тЪФя╕П The DangersтЪФя╕П

Nevermore isnтАЩt safe. It never was.

  • Whispers of the Hyde тАФ a monstrous beast that stalks the woods, leaving behind only blood and terror.

  • Secret societies with names older than the Academy itself.

  • Teachers who guard secrets too dark to ever be revealed.

  • Students who would rather bury you than let you climb higher than them.

And above all: the forest. The one every student is warned about. The one that hungers.

So ask yourself:

  • Will you explore the forbidden woods?

  • Will you uncover the AcademyтАЩs buried conspiracies?

  • Will you survive long enough to graduate?

ЁЯОн Your JourneyЁЯОн
